mapper.sql: select id, employee_id, employee_name, wage_month, total_process_count, total_ok_qty, total_defect_qty, should_wage, deduct_wage, actual_wage, status, audit_by_id, audit_by_name, audit_time, pay_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from t_erp_piece_wage
mapper.insert: insert into t_erp_piece_wage ( employee_id, employee_name, wage_month, total_process_count, total_ok_qty, total_defect_qty, should_wage, deduct_wage, actual_wage, status, audit_by_id, audit_by_name, audit_time, pay_time, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{employeeId}, #{employeeName}, #{wageMonth}, #{totalProcessCount}, #{totalOkQty}, #{totalDefectQty}, #{shouldWage}, #{deductWage}, #{actualWage}, #{status}, #{auditById}, #{auditByName}, #{auditTime}, #{payTime}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.delete:
delete from t_erp_piece_wage where id in
#{id}
